title: qt5-qt3d security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.15.9-2.1]
- Assimp: Fix heap-based overflow in Q3DLoader::InternReadFile
  Resolves: RHEL-120988
